# BlackRoad OS
> Your device. Your data. Your agents.

## About
BlackRoad OS Inc is a Delaware C-Corp (EIN 41-2663817) founded November 2025 by Alexa Louise Amundson.
An AI operating system running on 5 Raspberry Pis + 2 cloud droplets with 52 TOPS of local AI inference.

## Products
- Lucidia: AI companion with persistent memory ($20/mo)
- RoadWork: AI tutoring for education ($9.99/mo)
- RoadChain: Blockchain verification and audit trails
- Canvas Studio: Design tools ($29/mo)
- Video Studio: Browser-native 4K editing ($29/mo)
- Writing Studio: AI-assisted writing ($19/mo)
- RoundTrip: 69-agent communication hub (free)
- RoadPay: Payment processing (2.5% + $0.30)

## Infrastructure
- 7 nodes: Alice, Cecilia, Octavia, Aria, Lucidia, Gematria, Anastasia
- 52 TOPS local AI (2x Hailo-8 accelerators)
- 20 domains, 16 GitHub organizations, 1,697+ repositories
- 648 codex solutions, 71 agent intents, 231 executable actions

## Pricing
- Free tier available
- Rider: $29/month
- Paver: $99/month
- Enterprise: $299/month

## Links
- Website: https://blackroad.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/BlackRoad-OS-Inc
- AI: https://blackroadai.com
- Education: https://lucidia.earth
- Blockchain: https://roadchain.io
- Contact: alexa@blackroad.io

## Mathematics
The Amundson Framework: G(n) = n^(n+1)/(n+1)^n
Amundson Constant A_G = 1.244331783986725 (536/536 tests verified)
